basic.heading: Basic tags
basic.text: Plain tags rendered as spans, prefixed with the default # character.

withLinks.heading: Tags with links
withLinks.text: When each tag item includes an href, the tag is rendered as a clickable anchor element.

pill.heading: Pill-shaped tags
pill.text: Applying tagsStyle 'pill' gives each tag a rounded, pill-shaped appearance with a card background and shadow.

compress.heading: Compressed tags
compress.text: Setting compress to a number shows only the first N tags and hides the rest behind an expandable indicator.

format.heading: Formatted tags
format.text: With format enabled, tag labels are lowercased and word-spacing is reduced for a compact typographic style.

withMarker.heading: Tags with colour markers
withMarker.text: Enabling tagsMarker replaces the # prefix with a small filled circle icon coloured by each tag's color value.
